title: senna lactea
intro: Senna lactea, also known as the white senna, is a flowering plant species in the legume family that is native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include being a natural laxative due to its high concentration of anthraquinone glycosides. The health benefits of senna lactea include its ability to relieve constipation, promote digestive health, and support the treatment of various gastrointestinal disorders. Senna lactea is often prepared in herbal remedies, such as tea or capsules, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of constipation and promote overall digestive well-being.
